name: Воин Сожаления
description: No one is born intent on bringing evil into this world, yet many lives are transformed by the suffering inflicted upon them. Warriors of Regret are haunted by the shadows of evil deeds done. Through training and reflection, Warriors of Regret accept their past can't be erased. Instead, they focus on forging remorse and grief into a weapon against their foes. Though their misdeeds follow their every step, Warriors of Regret are not powerless to atone for them.

features.name: Shade of Regret
features.description: Once per turn, on your turn, you can expend 1 Focus Point (no action required) to create a shade of yourself in an unoccupied space you can see within 10 feet of yourself. The shade is intangible and doesn't occupy its space. It lasts until the end of your next turn, but it ends early if you dismiss it (no action required) or have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. While it persists, you gain the following benefits.

details.shadeStrike: {@b Shade Strike.} When you use Flurry of Blows, you can have the attacks originate from the shade instead of from yourself. Attacks originating from the shade deal Necrotic or Force damage (your choice) rather than their normal damage type.
details.move: {@b Move.} As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can move the shade up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is within 60 feet of yourself.

features.name: The Road Not Traveled
features.description: When you take the {@action Dash|XPHB} action, instead of moving, you can teleport yourself or an ally within 60 feet of you to the location of your shade.

features.name: Weight of the Past
features.description: When your shade is within 5 feet of a creature that makes a saving throw, you can use your {@action Reaction|XPHB} and expend 1 Focus Point to impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the saving throw.

features.name: Echoes of Remorse
features.description: When you create your shade, you can create two shades instead of one. Each shade follows the same rules. When you use Shade Strike, you can have attacks originate from either shade. You can move both shades with the same {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}.

features.name: Atonement
features.description: As an action, you can expend 5 Focus Points to merge with one of your shades for 1 minute. For the duration, you gain the following benefits: you have Resistance to all damage except Force and Radiant; you can move through creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} (you take {@damage 1d10} Force damage if you end your turn inside a creature or an object); when you deal damage with {@variantrule Unarmed Strikes|XPHB}, you deal extra Necrotic or Force damage (your choice) equal to your Wisdom modifier. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
